Premium Gold Services

Buy & Sell Gold with Confidence

Best market rates · Instant payment · Door-to-door service across Dubai

Sell Your Gold

We buy old gold, broken jewelry & coins at the best market rates — instant cash or bank transfer.

  • Free XRF purity testing
  • Best market rate guaranteed
  • Instant cash or bank transfer
  • Home pickup across Dubai
WhatsApp to Sell

Buy Premium Gold

Certified 18K gold jewelry with authenticity guarantees, lifetime warranty & buyback policy.

  • Certified 18K / 21K / 22K gold
  • Diamond certification available
  • Lifetime warranty & buyback
  • Secure home delivery
Browse Collection

Door-to-Door

Can't visit us? We come to you. Our expert evaluates your gold pieces at home — same day available.

  • Free home visit in Dubai
  • Expert evaluation on-site
  • Safe & fully insured
  • Same-day appointments

AI Virtual Try‑On

Upload your photo or activate your camera to see how our jewelry looks on you!

AI Technology

See It On You
Before You Buy

Our AI try-on technology lets you visualise any piece on your hand or wrist — from home, anytime, on any device.

  • AI-Powered Accuracy
    Realistic gold sheen, size & proportion matching
  • Any Device
    Phone, tablet or desktop — no app needed
  • Save & Share
    Download your look and share with family
  • 100% Private
    Photos never stored or shared

Or send us your photo on WhatsApp and our team will manually style the jewelry on it!

WhatsApp Try-On
